description: Frontmatter name field does not match the parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST requirement

description: --skills values are used directly in rm -rf "${target}/${skill}" and cp -R "${src}" "${target}/${skill}" without validating against path traversal characters
suggested_fix: Validate each skill token against ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$ before use, or verify realpath("${src}") stays within realpath("${skills_dir}")
